wins: Moved the strongest via-negativa survivors from chat memory into explicit owner surfaces in aoa-playbooks and aoa-techniques.
Preserved the inspect-first anti-authority posture by extending existing owner truth instead of inventing new deletion or automation authority.
Closed the follow-through honestly through merged owner PRs and one Dionysus session-harvest trail rather than leaving the harvest implicit.
frictions: The broader seed-wave delivery lane still crosses approval-sensitive public-share surfaces.
Owner-local pruning judgment remains stronger than any cross-repo convenience route.
The strongest outputs were extensions to existing owner surfaces, not a fresh quest or automation object.

extracts.title: Via-Negativa Owner-First Landing Bridge
extracts.summary: A staged-lineage route where Dionysus prep-pack truth still has to land through merged owner surfaces before the center can honestly demote itself to lineage-only replay.
notes: The durable object is a playbook-layer bridge from staged lineage to merged owner truth, not a bounded execution skill.

extracts.title: Pinned Validation Matrix Evidence Reinforcement
extracts.summary: A reusable publish-hygiene law strengthened by a second via-negativa replay, where workflow-pinned validation inputs mattered more than a convenient local sibling state.
notes: The replay strengthens a current promoted technique without yet proving canonical portability outside the aoa-routing and aoa-skills sibling family.

automation_candidate.title: Cross-Repo Seed-Wave Landing Lane
automation_candidate.current_manual_route: review prep pack -> bounded owner edits -> repo-native validation -> commit -> push -> open PR -> wait checks -> patch CI tail if needed -> merge -> Dionysus lineage closeout -> session-harvest follow-through
